description: Every upstream URL the Trader Desk backend calls. The browser never hits these directly; all requests are proxied through the FastAPI backend.

sources.name: Yahoo Finance — chart endpoint

headers.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7) TraderDesk/1.0

sources.rate_limit_strategy: 5s in-process TTL cache per symbol+range+interval, 1 retry with backoff
